name: remembrance-seams
description: The wiring contract. Each declared seam is a capability that should be CONTRIBUTING to the Remembrance field (a source in the field's per-source histogram). `npm run check:seams` diffs this against the live field: a declared seam with no recent contribution is silent drift — built but not flowing. This turns the ecosystem's #1 risk into a self-checking property.

seams.describe: Admitted leads contribute to the field through the covenant gate (lead-ledger recordBenefit). Inert = leads stopped flowing or the gate broke silently.
Rejected leads register an entropy cost (lead-ledger recordCost).
The local recall->librarian->verify->remember loop (the `remembrance` CLI / remembranced).
Resolved lead outcomes (won/lost) close the loop into the field — the external truth that validates the coherency grade (lead-outcomes recordBenefit/recordCost).
The meta seam: `check:seams --contribute` feeds the field its own wiring-coherence. If this goes stale, the watcher itself stopped running — the field stays aware of whether it is being watched.
